name: build_quadrant_phase3b
outcome_goal: Build tool and composite modules (retry of blocked jobs)

jobs.label: build_tool_modules_retry
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.

Build 4 tool modules. Each is a React TypeScript component that implements QuadrantProps from src/modules/types.ts and registers via registerModule from src/modules/moduleRegistry.ts. Use useModuleData from src/hooks/useModuleData.ts for data fetching. Import world from src/world.ts for state.

Dark theme CSS vars: --bg (#0d1117), --bg-card (#161b22), --accent (#58a6ff), --text (#c9d1d9), --text-muted (#8b949e), --border (#30363d), --success (#3fb950), --warning (#d29922), --danger (#f85149), --radius (8px), --space-sm/md/lg.

Create src/modules/tool/ directory with these files:

DispatchFormModule.tsx — id: 'dispatch-form'
- Renders: model dropdown + prompt textarea + Submit button
- Fetches model list from /api/models on mount
- On submit: logs to console (actual dispatch integration later)
- Shows result area below
- Default span: 2x1

SearchPanelModule.tsx — id: 'search-panel'
- Config: { endpoint?, placeholder? }
- Renders: search input + results list
- Default searches /api/registries/search?q=QUERY
- Results: name, description snippet, kind badge
- Debounced search (300ms)

DocumentProcessorModule.tsx — id: 'document-processor'
- Config: { chain: string[] }
- Reads from World path 'shared.document_content'
- Shows pipeline steps with status indicators (pending/running/done)
- Default span: 2x1

DataPipelineModule.tsx — id: 'data-pipeline'
- Config: { steps: [{name, status?}] }
- Visual step chain: boxes with arrows
- Status dots: gray=pending, yellow=running, green=done, red=failed

Also create src/modules/tool/index.ts that imports all 4 and calls registerModule for each with type: 'tool'.

Write all files.

jobs.label: build_composite_modules_retry
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.

Build 4 composite modules. Each is a React TypeScript component implementing QuadrantProps from src/modules/types.ts, registered via registerModule from src/modules/moduleRegistry.ts.

Use useModuleData from src/hooks/useModuleData.ts. Import world from src/world.ts.

Dark theme CSS vars: --bg (#0d1117), --bg-card (#161b22), --accent (#58a6ff), --text (#c9d1d9), --text-muted (#8b949e), --border (#30363d), --success (#3fb950), --warning (#d29922), --danger (#f85149), --radius (8px), --space-sm/md/lg.

Create src/modules/composite/ directory with these files:

WorkflowStatusModule.tsx — id: 'workflow-status'
- Fetches from /api/dispatch-status
- Shows: pass rate bar, dispatch counts, last activity timestamp
- Action buttons: Refresh
- Default span: 2x1

BugCardModule.tsx — id: 'bug-card'
- Fetches from /api/bugs
- Shows bug list: severity badge (P0=red, P1=orange, P2=yellow), title, status
- Click to expand details
- Default span: 2x1

ModelCardModule.tsx — id: 'model-card'
- Fetches from /api/models
- Shows grid of model cards: provider, model name, status dot, capability tags
- Click to select (writes to World shared.selected_model)
- Default span: 2x1

RegistryBrowserModule.tsx — id: 'registry-browser'
- Search input + 3 tab buttons (All | UI | Calcs | Workflows)
- Searches /api/registries/search?q=QUERY
- Results: name, description, category badge
- Default span: 2x2

Also create src/modules/composite/index.ts that imports all 4 and calls registerModule with type: 'composite'.

Write all files.
